Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to an application with no specific profiling rules. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" from new host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user "{subject.account.name}" from host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
